$comment: v2 P3: schema for $WORK_DIR/det-findings.json. Each finding is grounded in a static-analysis tool exit code (lint/typecheck/test) on a diff-touched line. Findings skip the cross-family verifier (already grounded in tool output, not model inference). source/agreement/verifier_verdict are pinned constants.

title.description: Short title summarizing the issue (keep under 80 chars).

body.description: Detailed explanation including the tool name and raw message.

path.description: Relative file path from repo root.

start_line.description: Starting line number of the issue.

end_line.description: Ending line number of the issue.

confidence_score.description: Always 1.0 for deterministic findings (tool exit code is full evidence).

category.description: Coarse category. type/test errors → correctness; lint warnings → style.
